name: hephaestus
description: Shared tooling plugin for the HomericIntelligence ecosystem. Ships 23 skills for repository auditing, agent orchestration, workflow discipline, and knowledge management.

interface.shortDescription: Repository auditing, agent orchestration, and workflow skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: ProjectHephaestus provides 23 Codex skills for repository analysis, strict PR review, Myrmidon swarm orchestration, test-driven development, systematic debugging, branch completion, worktree hygiene, and reusable Python project modernization workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Hephaestus to route this task to the right Codex skill.
